title: astragalus purshii
intro: Astragalus purshii, also known as Milk Vetch or Utah Milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to North America, belonging to the Astragalus genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Astragalus purshii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus purshii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in dried or fresh form in herbal remedies.
